successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest, LeaveRequestStatus, CreateLeaveRequestDto, UpdateLeaveRequestDto
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRequestRepository and LeaveRequestRepository
tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.repository.test.ts exists and contains Jest tests for LeaveRequestRepository methods
LeaveRequestRepository.create and updateStatus write audit records to audit_logs table (GP-002)
All repository methods catch and handle errors, no unhandled promise rejections (GP-006)
LeaveRequestRepository uses the pool from src/shared/db/connection.ts for database access (GP-001)
LeaveRequestStatus enum values match the CHECK constraint in leave_requests table
Created leave request has status 'draft' by default

constraints: All database access goes through repository interfaces (GP-001)
All state-changing operations write an audit record (GP-002)
All async errors are caught and handled (GP-006)
LeaveRequestRepository must use the pool from src/shared/db/connection.ts
LeaveRequestStatus enum values must match the CHECK constraint in leave_requests table
Created leave request must have status 'draft' by default
outOfScope: Integration with employee, policy, balance, notification modules
Database schema creation/migration for leave_requests table
Input validation at API boundaries (no API in this phase)
Any business logic beyond repository data access
